name: gmail_labels
description: List all Gmail labels, or modify labels on a message (mark read/unread, archive, star/unstar).

message_id.description: Required for modify actions (mark_read, mark_unread, archive, star, unstar)

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.
